This article about the Municipality of [Mozirje](/wiki/Mozirje "Mozirje") in [Slovenia](/wiki/Slovenia "Slovenia") is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=%C5%A0mihel_nad_Mozirjem&action=edit).

(pronounced [[ʃmiˈxeːu̯ nad mɔˈziːɾjɛm]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Slovene "Help:IPA/Slovene")) is a settlement in the [Municipality of Mozirje](/wiki/Municipality_of_Mozirje "Municipality of Mozirje") in northern [Slovenia](/wiki/Slovenia "Slovenia"). It lies below the Golte Hills north of Mozirje. The area is part of the traditional region of [Styria](/wiki/Lower_Styria "Lower Styria"). The municipality is now included in the [Savinja Statistical Region](/wiki/Savinja_Statistical_Region "Savinja Statistical Region").[[2]](#cite_note-2)
*Spremembe naselij 1948–95*. 1996. Database. Ljubljana: Geografski inštitut ZRC SAZU, DZS.
[Slovenian Ministry of Culture register of national heritage](http://rkd.situla.org/) reference number ešd 3177

**Šmihel nad Mozirjem** (pronounced [[ʃmiˈxeːu̯ nad mɔˈziːɾjɛm]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Slovene "Help:IPA/Slovene")) is a settlement in the [Municipality of Mozirje](/wiki/Municipality_of_Mozirje "Municipality of Mozirje") in northern [Slovenia](/wiki/Slovenia "Slovenia"). It lies below the Golte Hills north of Mozirje. The area is part of the traditional region of [Styria](/wiki/Lower_Styria "Lower Styria"). The municipality is now included in the [Savinja Statistical Region](/wiki/Savinja_Statistical_Region "Savinja Statistical Region").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Name

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=%C5%A0mihel_nad_Mozirjem&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Name")]

The name of the settlement was changed from *Šmihel* to *Šmihel nad Mozirjem* in 1955.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Church

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=%C5%A0mihel_nad_Mozirjem&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Church")]

The [parish church](/wiki/Parish_church "Parish church") from which the settlement gets its name is dedicated to [Saint Michael](/wiki/Michael_(archangel) "Michael (archangel)") and belongs to the [Roman Catholic Diocese of Celje](/wiki/Roman_Catholic_Diocese_of_Celje "Roman Catholic Diocese of Celje"). It dates to the 17th century.[[4]](#cite_note-4)
